name: Foxhole Lounge
content: Foxhole is a slightly cheesy desert-storm-era army-themed bar and music venue. I went to a techno night there and it was a lot of fun, lots of goofy people from all different scenes hanging out and dancing together. One of the things I like about small-town alternative scenes is that because there’s very limited options on where to hang out, there’s no gatekeeping or arguing over exactly what genre something is, nor can people hide in one genre and never see what else there is out there.
